CustomField.formula: IF( B2B_Public__c, IMAGE( "https://barcode.orcascan.com/?type=qr&data=" & $Label.B2B_Site_Public_Url_For_QR & Id & "&text=" & B2B_Name__c, B2B_Name__c, 200, 160 ), IMAGE( "https://barcode.orcascan.com/?type=qr&data=" & $Label.B2B_Site_Custom_Url_For_QR & Id & "&text=" & B2B_Name__c, B2B_Name__c, 200, 160 ) )
CustomField.label: QR Code
